authoredShaderContract.colorPath: Geometry Attribute col Color → Emission Color
authoredShaderContract.strengthPath: Geometry Attribute power Vector → Emission Strength
authoredShaderContract.browserResolution: FLOAT_COLOR storage now preserves Blender's negative and HDR channels; only BYTE_COLOR clamps to normalized storage. Authored capture uses NoToneMapping so HDR white clips at display white like Blender Standard.

capture.geometrySpace: authored source rotation and scale; each renderer frames the evaluated surface center
capture.colorManagement: Blender uses Standard with Look=None; WebGL uses NoToneMapping and sRGB output.

interpretation: Blender's opaque surface is display white and 97.23% of the WebGL surface pixels are display white; the remaining RGB error is edge antialias coverage. Geometry, material assignment, HDR color, and emission strength match.
